summary: Tailor OMAD V04 to Muscle Meat broccoli, asparagus and 333g Skyr
description: Replace AH broccoli and Italian/grilled vegetables with Muscle Meat 250g broccoli plus 100g green asparagus, giving a clean 10-meal package rhythm and removing the disliked €1.70 grilled-vegetable portion. Reduce Skyr from 500g to 333g, regenerate all costs and nutrient totals, update the article, verify, deploy and read back live.
acceptance: No AH broccoli/Italian/grilled vegetable remains in V04; Muscle Meat broccoli 250g and green asparagus 100g are source-linked; Skyr is 333g; generated costs/macros/micros and live UI agree.
verification: python3 scripts/omad-v04-nutrition.py --check && npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo && git diff --check

evidence.summary: Muscle Meat broccoli 250g (€0.80) and green asparagus 100g (€1.25) replace AH veg; both packs yield exactly ten meals; Skyr 333g; generated totals/costs refreshed; no stale grilled/Italian/AH broccoli strings; 55 tests, site, SEO and browser render with zero overflow green.
